									window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "close" });
								}
							}
                        });

					const visitSiteButton = modal.element.querySelector(".visitSiteButton");
					if (visitSiteButton) {
                        
						utilities.ui.addEventListener(visitSiteButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (externalUrl) {
								window.open(externalUrl, "_blank");
							}

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "visit_site" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

                    const cancelButton = modal.element.querySelector(".cancelButton");
					if (cancelButton) {

						utilities.ui.addEventListener(cancelButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "cancel" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

					modal.open();
				}
			};
		});
	});
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	window.addEventListener("load", function () {

		const contentContainer = document.querySelector(".discoveryUIContent");
		if (!contentContainer) {
			return;
		}

		const imgExists = !!(contentContainer.querySelector(".heroImageContainer") || contentContainer.querySelector(".thumbnailContainer"));
		if (imgExists) {
			const stickyHeaderContainer = contentContainer.querySelector("#yesNoMaybe") || contentContainer.querySelector(".saveArea");
			if (stickyHeaderContainer) {
				const stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer = document.createElement("div");
				stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer.id = "stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer";
				stickyHeaderContainer.prepend(stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer);
				renderStickyHeaderThumbnail();
			}
		}

		// #region Hero Image Events

		const heroImageContainerEl = document.querySelector(".heroImageContainer");
		if (!heroImageContainerEl) {
			return;
		}

		// log royalty events for full-size hero images

		const isThumbnailImage = "true" === "true";
		if (!isThumbnailImage) {
			window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("utilities", function(utilities) {
				utilities.tracking.trackEvent("CoreUI_ContentMediaViewed");
				utilities.logging.logContentViewRecordImageBusinessEvent();
			});
		}

		// hero image click event

		const heroImageLinkEl = heroImageContainerEl.querySelector(".heroImageLink");
		heroImageLinkEl.addEventListener("click", () => {
			if (window.tracking) {
				window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_click" });
			}
		});

		// view image button click event

		const viewImageBtns = heroImageContainerEl.querySelectorAll(".ancBtn.viewRecord").forEach(btn => {
			btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
				if (window.tracking) {
					window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_cta_click" });
				}
			});
		});

		// partner attribution click event

		const externalImageLink = heroImageContainerEl.querySelector(".externalImageLink");
		if (externalImageLink) {
			externalImageLink.addEventListener("click", () => {
				if (window.tracking) {
					window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "source_website_link", clickSubType: "partner_attribution_hero_image" });
				}
			});
		}
		// #endregion Hero Image Events

		return;

		function renderStickyHeaderThumbnail() {

			window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return (window.recordThumbnails || {}).render; }, function(err, render) {

				try {

					if (err) { throw err; }

					const thumbnailData = {"recordGid":{"v":"692270:60526"},"images":[],"externalUrl":"https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/97626131/william-chandler","collection":{"id":60526,"title":"UK and Ireland, Find a Grave® Index, 1300s-Current","isMachineIndexed":false,"isWebCrawled":true,"partnerContract":{"id":238}},"hover":{"preview":true,"delay":300,"suppressOnboarding":false},"context":{"client":"discoveryui-content"}};

					thumbnailData.dom = {
						containerId: "stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer",
						fixedSize: 50,
						iconClass: "noDisplay",
						callbacks: {
							onclick() {
								window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "image_thumbnail" });
							},
							externalSiteModal: {
								onclose(e) {
									
									if (!e?.detail?.isProgrammaticClose) {
										window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "close" });
									}
								},
								onctaclick() {
									window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "visit_site" });
								}
							}
						}
					};

					thumbnailData.hover = undefined;

					render({ thumbnails: [thumbnailData] });
				}
				catch (err) {

					console.log("renderStickyHeaderThumbnail: err: ", err);
				}
			});
		}
	});

	function initializeImageHighlighting() {

		try {
			const heroImageContainer = document.querySelector(".heroImageContainer");

			if (!heroImageContainer) {
				return;
			}
			const heroImageWrapperEl = heroImageContainer.querySelector(".heroImageWrapper");
			const recordImageEl = heroImageWrapperEl.querySelector("img");
			const recordRows = {};

			if (!recordRows.primaryRecordRows || !recordRows.primaryRecordRows.length) {
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
				return;
			}

			const svgEl = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
			svgEl.classList.add("highlightSvg");
			svgEl.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${recordImageEl.naturalWidth} ${recordImageEl.naturalHeight}`);
			svgEl.setAttribute("preserveAspectRatio", "xMinYMin meet");
			
			recordRows.primaryRecordRows.forEach(row => {
				appendSvgRect(row, true);
			});

			if (recordRows.householdRecordRows) {
				recordRows.householdRecordRows.forEach(row => {
					appendSvgRect(row, false);
				});
			}
			
			heroImageWrapperEl.appendChild(svgEl);
			centerPrimaryRow();
			const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(centerPrimaryRow);
			resizeObserver.observe(recordImageEl);

			function appendSvgRect(row, isPrimaryRecord) {

				const polygon = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "polygon");
				const points = `${row.topLeft.x},${row.topLeft.y} ${row.topRight.x},${row.topRight.y} ${row.bottomRight.x},${row.bottomRight.y} ${row.bottomLeft.x},${row.bottomLeft.y}`;
				polygon.setAttribute("points", points);
				polygon.setAttribute("fill", isPrimaryRecord ? "#FFFF33" : "#72AE24");
				polygon.setAttribute("opacity", "0.25");
				svgEl.appendChild(polygon);
			}

			function centerPrimaryRow() {

				const primaryRow = recordRows.primaryRecordRows[0];
				const scale = recordImageEl.clientWidth / recordImageEl.naturalWidth;
				const rowCenterY = ((primaryRow.topLeft.y + primaryRow.bottomLeft.y) / 2) * scale;
				const heroImageContainerCenterY = heroImageContainer.clientHeight / 2;
				heroImageWrapperEl.style.transform = `translateY(${heroImageContainerCenterY - rowCenterY}px)`;
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
			}
		}
		catch (err) {

			heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
		}
	}
</script>
<script id="pageUtilScript">

	(function(consolable) {

		window.pageUtil = window.moduleUtil = window.moduleUtil || {

			waitFor: function(resolver, callback) {
				var intervalMs = 40, retries = 200;

				function checkAvailability(tries) {
					const result = resolver();

					if (result) {
						callback(null, result);
					} else if (tries >= retries) {
						callback("Failed to resolve", result);
					} else {
						setTimeout(() => { checkAvailability(tries + 1); } , intervalMs);
					}
				};

				checkAvailability(0);
			},

			whenModuleAvailable: function(moduleName, callback) {
				window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return window[moduleName]; }, function(err, result) {

					if (!err) {
						callback(window[moduleName]);
					}
				});
			}
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackEvent = function() {

			if (!window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled && consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent].info: pageUtil.trackInit not successfully called.");
			}

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.trackEvent) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent]: ", arguments);
			}

			return window.tracking.trackEvent.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackInit = function() {

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.startTracking) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackInit]: ", arguments);
			}

			var result = window.tracking.startTracking.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
			window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled = true;

			return result;
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackRecordViewed = function() {

			window.pageUtil.trackEvent("CoreUI_ContentRecordTextViewed");
		};
	})("false" === "true");
</script>

    window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal = window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal || {};

    window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.whenModuleAvailable = function(moduleName, callback) {

        var retryCount = 0;
        var intervalId = window.setInterval(function () {
            if (window[moduleName]) {
                window.clearInterval(intervalId);
                callback(window[moduleName]);
            }
            else {
                retryCount += 1;
                if (retryCount > 200) {
                    clearInterval(intervalId);
                    console.log("Cannot find " + moduleName);
                }
            }
        }, 40);
    };

    window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.whenModuleAvailable("discoveryUIImageviewerModalFactory", imageviewerModalFactory => {
        var imageviewerModalModule = imageviewerModalFactory();
        window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.launch = imageviewerModalModule.launch;
        window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.callbacks = {
            close: imageviewerModalModule.close
        };
    });
</script>

		<script type="text/javascript">
			window.addEventListener("load", function() {

		
				var containerEls = document.querySelectorAll(".recordServiceData");

				containerEls.forEach(containerEl => {
					linkEls = containerEl.querySelectorAll(".link.correction") || [];
					linkEls.forEach(function(linkEl) {
						linkEl.addEventListener("click", function(event) {
							if (window.corrections) {
								window.corrections.showFromDefaults(event.target);
							}
						});
					});

					linkEls = containerEl.querySelectorAll(".mapLink[data-place-names]");
					linkEls.forEach(function(linkEl) {
						var placeNames = linkEl.getAttribute("data-place-names") || "";
						var modalTitle = linkEl.getAttribute("data-modal-title") || "";

						linkEl.addEventListener("click", function(event) {
							if ("function" === typeof (window.contentMap || {}).showModal) {
								window.contentMap.showModal(modalTitle, placeNames, event.target);
							}
						});
					});

					linkEls = containerEl.querySelectorAll(".neighborsLink[data-image-gid]");
					linkEls.forEach(function(linkEl) {
						var imageGid = linkEl.getAttribute("data-image-gid") || "";
						var modalTitle = linkEl.getAttribute("data-modal-title") || "";

						linkEl.addEventListener("click", function(event) {
							if ("function" === typeof (window.contentNeighbors || {}).showModal) {
								window.contentNeighbors.showModal(modalTitle, imageGid, event.target);
							}
						});
					});

					linkEls = containerEl.querySelectorAll(".externalLink");
					linkEls.forEach(function(externalLinkEl) {
						var webCrawledExternalUrl = externalLinkEl.getAttribute("data-web-crawled-url");

						externalLinkEl.addEventListener("click", function(event) {
							// Send unified event
							window.utilities.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "source_website_link", clickSubType: "url_in_detail" });

							// show a modal warning the user they're navigating away from Ancestry for web-crawled external urls
							if (webCrawledExternalUrl && "function" === typeof (window.webCrawledModal || {}).showModal) {
								window.webCrawledModal.showModal(webCrawledExternalUrl, externalLinkEl);
							}
						});
					});
				});
			});
		</script>

			window.addEventListener("load", function() {

				// set up details info callout
				createDetailsInfoCallout();

				// monitor right column visibility
				monitorRightColumnVisibility();
			});

			function monitorRightColumnVisibility() {

				const recordPage = document.querySelector('.cssGridRecordPage');
				const thumbnailContainer = document.querySelector('.thumbnailRecordPageContainer');
				const rightColumn = document.querySelector('.cssGridCol:last-child');

				if (!recordPage || !rightColumn) {
					return;
				}

				let debounceTimer;

				function checkVisibility() {

					clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
					debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
						const allItems = rightColumn.querySelectorAll('.cssGridItem');
						const shouldHide = allItems.length === 0;

						// add single-column style if there are no .cssGridItem in rightColumn
						recordPage.classList[shouldHide ? "add" : "remove"]('single-column');
						if (thumbnailContainer) {
							thumbnailContainer.classList[shouldHide ? "add" : "remove"]('single-column');
						}
					}, 100);
				}

				// initial check
				setTimeout(checkVisibility, 1000);

				// monitor for child element changes (e.g. removal)
				const observer = new MutationObserver(checkVisibility);
				observer.observe(rightColumn, {
					subtree: true,
					// note: childList:true could cause some jumpiness when page is rendering,
					// but supports dynamic deletion of elements (instead of simply adding .noDisplay)
					childList: true
				});
			}

			function createDetailsInfoCallout() {

				const detailsHelpEl = document.getElementById("detailsHelp");
				if (!detailsHelpEl) {
					return;
				}

				const helpContent = `
					<p>When you're reviewing this record, keep in mind:</p>
					<ul class="bulleted" style="margin-left: 20px">
					<li><p>Human error and damage over time can lead to incorrect or incomplete details</p></li>
					
					<li><p>When it's available, you can view the record image to find more details to help you decide</p></li>
					</ul>
					`;
				window.ui.callout(detailsHelpEl, {
					content: helpContent,
					width: "350"
				});
			}
		</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	window.addEventListener("load", function() {
		window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("utilities", function(utilities) {

			let isProgrammaticClose = false;

			window.webCrawledModal = {
				showModal: function(externalUrl, trigger) {

					const modal = window.webCrawledModal.modal = window.webCrawledModal.modal ||
						window.ui.modal("#aspenWebCrawledModal", { 
                            open: false,
                            trigger,
							onOpen: function() {
								isProgrammaticClose = false;
							},
							onClose: function() {
								if (!isProgrammaticClose && window.tracking) {
									window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "close" });
								}
							}
                        });

					const visitSiteButton = modal.element.querySelector(".visitSiteButton");
					if (visitSiteButton) {
                        
						utilities.ui.addEventListener(visitSiteButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (externalUrl) {
								window.open(externalUrl, "_blank");
							}

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "visit_site" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

                    const cancelButton = modal.element.querySelector(".cancelButton");
					if (cancelButton) {

						utilities.ui.addEventListener(cancelButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "cancel" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

					modal.open();
				}
			};
		});
	});
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	window.addEventListener("load", function () {

		const contentContainer = document.querySelector(".discoveryUIContent");
		if (!contentContainer) {
			return;
		}

		const imgExists = !!(contentContainer.querySelector(".heroImageContainer") || contentContainer.querySelector(".thumbnailContainer"));
		if (imgExists) {
			const stickyHeaderContainer = contentContainer.querySelector("#yesNoMaybe") || contentContainer.querySelector(".saveArea");
			if (stickyHeaderContainer) {
				const stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer = document.createElement("div");
				stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer.id = "stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer";
				stickyHeaderContainer.prepend(stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer);
				renderStickyHeaderThumbnail();
			}
		}

		// #region Hero Image Events

		const heroImageContainerEl = document.querySelector(".heroImageContainer");
		if (!heroImageContainerEl) {
			return;
		}

		// log royalty events for full-size hero images

		const isThumbnailImage = "" === "true";
		if (!isThumbnailImage) {
			window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("utilities", function(utilities) {
				utilities.tracking.trackEvent("CoreUI_ContentMediaViewed");
				utilities.logging.logContentViewRecordImageBusinessEvent();
			});
		}

		// hero image click event

		const heroImageLinkEl = heroImageContainerEl.querySelector(".heroImageLink");
		heroImageLinkEl.addEventListener("click", () => {
			if (window.tracking) {
				window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_click" });
			}
		});

		// view image button click event

		const viewImageBtns = heroImageContainerEl.querySelectorAll(".ancBtn.viewRecord").forEach(btn => {
			btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
				if (window.tracking) {
					window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_cta_click" });
				}
			});
		});

		// partner attribution click event

		const externalImageLink = heroImageContainerEl.querySelector(".externalImageLink");
		if (externalImageLink) {
			externalImageLink.addEventListener("click", () => {
				if (window.tracking) {
					window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "source_website_link", clickSubType: "partner_attribution_hero_image" });
				}
			});
		}
		// #endregion Hero Image Events

		return;

		function renderStickyHeaderThumbnail() {

			window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return (window.recordThumbnails || {}).render; }, function(err, render) {

				try {

					if (err) { throw err; }

					const thumbnailData = {"recordGid":{"v":"15281109:9840:15281109"},"images":[],"externalUrl":"https://familysearch.org/pal:/MM9.1.1/J8DH-DX7","collection":{"id":9840,"title":"England, Select Deaths and Burials, 1538-1991","isMachineIndexed":false,"isWebCrawled":false,"partnerContract":{"id":91}},"hover":{"preview":true,"delay":300,"suppressOnboarding":false},"context":{"client":"discoveryui-content"}};

					thumbnailData.dom = {
						containerId: "stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer",
						fixedSize: 50,
						iconClass: "noDisplay",
						callbacks: {
							onclick() {
								window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "image_thumbnail" });
							},
							externalSiteModal: {
								onclose(e) {
									
									if (!e?.detail?.isProgrammaticClose) {
										window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "close" });
									}
								},
								onctaclick() {
									window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "visit_site" });
								}
							}
						}
					};

					thumbnailData.hover = undefined;

					render({ thumbnails: [thumbnailData] });
				}
				catch (err) {

					console.log("renderStickyHeaderThumbnail: err: ", err);
				}
			});
		}
	});

	function initializeImageHighlighting() {

		try {
			const heroImageContainer = document.querySelector(".heroImageContainer");

			if (!heroImageContainer) {
				return;
			}
			const heroImageWrapperEl = heroImageContainer.querySelector(".heroImageWrapper");
			const recordImageEl = heroImageWrapperEl.querySelector("img");
			const recordRows = {};

			if (!recordRows.primaryRecordRows || !recordRows.primaryRecordRows.length) {
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
				return;
			}

			const svgEl = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
			svgEl.classList.add("highlightSvg");
			svgEl.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${recordImageEl.naturalWidth} ${recordImageEl.naturalHeight}`);
			svgEl.setAttribute("preserveAspectRatio", "xMinYMin meet");
			
			recordRows.primaryRecordRows.forEach(row => {
				appendSvgRect(row, true);
			});

			if (recordRows.householdRecordRows) {
				recordRows.householdRecordRows.forEach(row => {
					appendSvgRect(row, false);
				});
			}
			
			heroImageWrapperEl.appendChild(svgEl);
			centerPrimaryRow();
			const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(centerPrimaryRow);
			resizeObserver.observe(recordImageEl);

			function appendSvgRect(row, isPrimaryRecord) {

				const polygon = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "polygon");
				const points = `${row.topLeft.x},${row.topLeft.y} ${row.topRight.x},${row.topRight.y} ${row.bottomRight.x},${row.bottomRight.y} ${row.bottomLeft.x},${row.bottomLeft.y}`;
				polygon.setAttribute("points", points);
				polygon.setAttribute("fill", isPrimaryRecord ? "#FFFF33" : "#72AE24");
				polygon.setAttribute("opacity", "0.25");
				svgEl.appendChild(polygon);
			}

			function centerPrimaryRow() {

				const primaryRow = recordRows.primaryRecordRows[0];
				const scale = recordImageEl.clientWidth / recordImageEl.naturalWidth;
				const rowCenterY = ((primaryRow.topLeft.y + primaryRow.bottomLeft.y) / 2) * scale;
				const heroImageContainerCenterY = heroImageContainer.clientHeight / 2;
				heroImageWrapperEl.style.transform = `translateY(${heroImageContainerCenterY - rowCenterY}px)`;
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
			}
		}
		catch (err) {

			heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
		}
	}
</script>
<script id="pageUtilScript">

	(function(consolable) {

		window.pageUtil = window.moduleUtil = window.moduleUtil || {

			waitFor: function(resolver, callback) {
				var intervalMs = 40, retries = 200;

				function checkAvailability(tries) {
					const result = resolver();

					if (result) {
						callback(null, result);
					} else if (tries >= retries) {
						callback("Failed to resolve", result);
					} else {
						setTimeout(() => { checkAvailability(tries + 1); } , intervalMs);
					}
				};

				checkAvailability(0);
			},

			whenModuleAvailable: function(moduleName, callback) {
				window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return window[moduleName]; }, function(err, result) {

					if (!err) {
						callback(window[moduleName]);
					}
				});
			}
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackEvent = function() {

			if (!window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled && consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent].info: pageUtil.trackInit not successfully called.");
			}

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.trackEvent) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent]: ", arguments);
			}

			return window.tracking.trackEvent.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackInit = function() {

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.startTracking) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackInit]: ", arguments);
			}

			var result = window.tracking.startTracking.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
			window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled = true;

			return result;
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackRecordViewed = function() {

			window.pageUtil.trackEvent("CoreUI_ContentRecordTextViewed");
		};
	})("false" === "true");
</script>

						confirmRemoveFromTree: `Are you sure you want to permanently remove this record from your tree?`,
						inTreeMultiple: `<span class='personRecordSavedToText'><a href='{url}' class='savedToPersonLink'>{personName}</a></span> in tree: <span class='treeRecordSavedTo'>"{treeName}"</span>`,
						otherTreesCanEdit: `Trees shared with you`,
						recordRemovedFromPerson: `You've removed this record from {personName} in the tree: {treeName}.`,
                        recordRemovedFromShoebox: `You've removed this record from your shoebox.`,
						recordSavedToMultiplePeopleMultipleTrees: `This record is saved to {0}{peopleCount} people in {treeCount} trees{1}.`,
                    	recordSavedToMultiplePeopleSingleTree: `This record is saved to {0}{peopleCount} people in 1 tree{1}.`,
						recordSavedToShoebox: `This record is saved in your {0}shoebox{1}.`,
						recordSavedToShoeboxAndMultiplePeopleMultipleTrees: `This record is saved in your {0}shoebox and to {peopleCount} people in {treeCount} trees{1}.`,
                    	recordSavedToShoeboxAndMultiplePeopleSingleTree: `This record is saved in your {0}shoebox and to {peopleCount} people in 1 tree{1}.`,
                    	recordSavedToShoeboxAndSinglePerson: `This record is saved in your {0}shoebox and to 1 person in 1 tree{1}.`,
                    	recordSavedToShoeboxNotification: "This record has been saved in your shoebox.",
						recordSavedToSinglePerson: `This record is saved to {0}1 person in 1 tree{1}.`,
						removeFromPersonConfirmation: `Are you sure you want to remove this record from {personName}?`,
                        removeFromShoeboxConfirmation: `Are you sure you want to remove this record from your shoebox?`,
						removeFromTree: `Remove`,
						saveRecordCreateTree: `<strong>Save record</strong> and create a <strong>family tree</strong><p class='icon iconLeaf'>Saving this record creates a tree and activates hints to help you find records.</p>`,
						saveToPerson: `Save this record to <strong>{0}</strong>`,
						saveToSomeone: `Save to someone in my tree`,
						saveToShoebox: `Save to my shoebox`,
						selectPersonError: `Add name of person in your tree`,
						treeRoleEditor: `Your role: Editor`,
						treeRoleOwner: `Your role: Owner`
					},
					settings: {
						saveRecordEnabled: `true` === "true",
						showSavedToData: `true` === "true",
						usePub: `true` === "true"
					},
					urls: {
						contentServiceUrlPrefix: "/discoveryui-contentservice",
						personProfilePhotoUrl: "/api/media/retrieval/v2/image/namespaces/1093/media/{photoId}?client=discoveryui-content&MaxSide=32",
						treesUrlPrefix: "/family-tree"
					}
				},
				window.utilities,
				window.utilities.tracking,
				window.utilities.logging);

				saveRecordModule.init();
			});
			// #endregion Save Record

			// #region Suggested Records
				window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("suggestedRecordsFactory", function(suggestedRecordsFactory) {

					var suggestedRecordsModule = suggestedRecordsFactory({
							resources: {
								help: {
									description: "These suggestions come from data in this record and similar records saved in other people's trees.",
									title: "How we find suggestions for you",
									text: "Help"
								}
							},
							urls: {
								contentPageUrlTemplate: "http://www.ancestry.com/search/collections/{collectionId}/records/{recordId}",
								contentServiceUrlPrefix: "/discoveryui-contentservice"
							}
						},
						window.utilities,
						window.utilities.tracking,
						window.utilities.logging
					);

					suggestedRecordsModule.show({ v: "15281109:9840" }, { hintId: "", personId: "", treeId: "" });
				});
			// #endregion Suggested Records

			// #region Tree Card
			// #endregion Tree Card

			// #region Yes No Maybe
			// #endregion Yes No Maybe

			// #region Record Compare
			// #endregion Record Compare

			// #region Hint Metering Widget
			// #endregion Hint Metering Widget

			// #endregion Widgets

			// #region Coco Manager

			window.utilities.whenIsAvailable(() => window.ancestry?.coco).then(coco => {
				window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("cocoManagerFactory", function(cocoManagerFactory) {

					window.cocoManager = cocoManagerFactory({}, window.utilities, window.utilities.tracking, window.utilities.logging, coco);
				});
			})
			.catch(err => output("error resolving coco: ", err));

			// #endregion Coco Manager

			// Start the tracking library - at the end of everything else to be loaded
			window.pageUtil.trackInit("true" === "true", "https://www.ancestrycdn.com/ui-static/lib/tracking/11/tracking.js", {"stackId":"discoveryui-content","databaseId":"9840","databasePartnerId":"","recordId":"15281109","imageId":"","treeId":"","personId":"","hintId":"","queryId":"","isUserCreated":false});
			window.pageUtil.trackRecordViewed();
		});
		// #endregion Utilities
	});
</script>

        var intervalId = window.setInterval(function () {
            if (window[moduleName]) {
                window.clearInterval(intervalId);
                callback(window[moduleName]);
            }
            else {
                retryCount += 1;
                if (retryCount > 200) {

                }
            }
        }, 40);

		<script type="text/javascript">
			window.addEventListener("load", function() {

				// set up details info callout
				createDetailsInfoCallout();

				// monitor right column visibility
				monitorRightColumnVisibility();
			});

			function monitorRightColumnVisibility() {

				const recordPage = document.querySelector('.cssGridRecordPage');
				const thumbnailContainer = document.querySelector('.thumbnailRecordPageContainer');
				const rightColumn = document.querySelector('.cssGridCol:last-child');

				if (!recordPage || !rightColumn) {
					return;
				}

				let debounceTimer;

				function checkVisibility() {

					clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
					debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
						const allItems = rightColumn.querySelectorAll('.cssGridItem');
						const shouldHide = allItems.length === 0;

						// add single-column style if there are no .cssGridItem in rightColumn
						recordPage.classList[shouldHide ? "add" : "remove"]('single-column');
						if (thumbnailContainer) {
							thumbnailContainer.classList[shouldHide ? "add" : "remove"]('single-column');
						}
					}, 100);
				}

				// initial check
				setTimeout(checkVisibility, 1000);

				// monitor for child element changes (e.g. removal)
				const observer = new MutationObserver(checkVisibility);
				observer.observe(rightColumn, {
					subtree: true,
					// note: childList:true could cause some jumpiness when page is rendering,
					// but supports dynamic deletion of elements (instead of simply adding .noDisplay)
					childList: true
				});
			}

			function createDetailsInfoCallout() {

				const detailsHelpEl = document.getElementById("detailsHelp");
				if (!detailsHelpEl) {
					return;
				}

				const helpContent = `
					<p>When you're reviewing this record, keep in mind:</p>
					<ul class="bulleted" style="margin-left: 20px">
					<li><p>Human error and damage over time can lead to incorrect or incomplete details</p></li>
					
					<li><p>When it's available, you can view the record image to find more details to help you decide</p></li>
					</ul>
					`;
				window.ui.callout(detailsHelpEl, {
					content: helpContent,
					width: "350"
				});
			}
		</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	window.addEventListener("load", function() {
		window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("utilities", function(utilities) {

			let isProgrammaticClose = false;

			window.webCrawledModal = {
				showModal: function(externalUrl, trigger) {

					const modal = window.webCrawledModal.modal = window.webCrawledModal.modal ||
						window.ui.modal("#aspenWebCrawledModal", { 
                            open: false,
                            trigger,
							onOpen: function() {
								isProgrammaticClose = false;
							},
							onClose: function() {
								if (!isProgrammaticClose && window.tracking) {
									window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "close" });
								}
							}
                        });

					const visitSiteButton = modal.element.querySelector(".visitSiteButton");
					if (visitSiteButton) {
                        
						utilities.ui.addEventListener(visitSiteButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (externalUrl) {
								window.open(externalUrl, "_blank");
							}

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "visit_site" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

                    const cancelButton = modal.element.querySelector(".cancelButton");
					if (cancelButton) {

						utilities.ui.addEventListener(cancelButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "cancel" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

					modal.open();
				}
			};
		});
	});
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	window.addEventListener("load", function () {

				window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_click" });

					window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_cta_click" });

				if (window.tracking) {

		return;

		function renderStickyHeaderThumbnail() {

			window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return (window.recordThumbnails || {}).render; }, function(err, render) {

					const thumbnailData = {"recordGid":{"v":"1303974:62128:1303974"},"images":[{"id":"par_415-1-5-1_048","type":null}],"collection":{"id":62128,"title":"East Sussex, England, Church of England Deaths and Burials, 1813-1995","isMachineIndexed":false,"isWebCrawled":false,"partnerContract":{"id":246}},"hover":{"preview":true,"delay":300,"suppressOnboarding":false},"context":{"client":"discoveryui-content"}};

		try {
			const heroImageContainer = document.querySelector(".heroImageContainer");

			if (!heroImageContainer) {
				return;
			}
			const heroImageWrapperEl = heroImageContainer.querySelector(".heroImageWrapper");
			const recordImageEl = heroImageWrapperEl.querySelector("img");
			const recordRows = {};

			if (!recordRows.primaryRecordRows || !recordRows.primaryRecordRows.length) {
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
				return;
			}

			const svgEl = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
			svgEl.classList.add("highlightSvg");
			svgEl.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${recordImageEl.naturalWidth} ${recordImageEl.naturalHeight}`);
			svgEl.setAttribute("preserveAspectRatio", "xMinYMin meet");
			
			recordRows.primaryRecordRows.forEach(row => {
				appendSvgRect(row, true);
			});

			if (recordRows.householdRecordRows) {
				recordRows.householdRecordRows.forEach(row => {
					appendSvgRect(row, false);
				});
			}
			
			heroImageWrapperEl.appendChild(svgEl);
			centerPrimaryRow();
			const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(centerPrimaryRow);
			resizeObserver.observe(recordImageEl);

			function appendSvgRect(row, isPrimaryRecord) {

				const polygon = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "polygon");
				const points = `${row.topLeft.x},${row.topLeft.y} ${row.topRight.x},${row.topRight.y} ${row.bottomRight.x},${row.bottomRight.y} ${row.bottomLeft.x},${row.bottomLeft.y}`;
				polygon.setAttribute("points", points);
				polygon.setAttribute("fill", isPrimaryRecord ? "#FFFF33" : "#72AE24");
				polygon.setAttribute("opacity", "0.25");
				svgEl.appendChild(polygon);
			}

			function centerPrimaryRow() {

				const primaryRow = recordRows.primaryRecordRows[0];
				const scale = recordImageEl.clientWidth / recordImageEl.naturalWidth;
				const rowCenterY = ((primaryRow.topLeft.y + primaryRow.bottomLeft.y) / 2) * scale;
				const heroImageContainerCenterY = heroImageContainer.clientHeight / 2;
				heroImageWrapperEl.style.transform = `translateY(${heroImageContainerCenterY - rowCenterY}px)`;
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
			}
		}
		catch (err) {

			heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
		}
	}
</script>
<script id="pageUtilScript">

	(function(consolable) {

		window.pageUtil = window.moduleUtil = window.moduleUtil || {

			waitFor: function(resolver, callback) {
				var intervalMs = 40, retries = 200;

				function checkAvailability(tries) {
					const result = resolver();

					if (result) {
						callback(null, result);
					} else if (tries >= retries) {
						callback("Failed to resolve", result);
					} else {
						setTimeout(() => { checkAvailability(tries + 1); } , intervalMs);
					}
				};

				checkAvailability(0);
			},

			whenModuleAvailable: function(moduleName, callback) {
				window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return window[moduleName]; }, function(err, result) {

					if (!err) {
						callback(window[moduleName]);
					}
				});
			}
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackEvent = function() {

			if (!window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled && consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent].info: pageUtil.trackInit not successfully called.");
			}

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.trackEvent) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent]: ", arguments);
			}

			return window.tracking.trackEvent.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackInit = function() {

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.startTracking) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackInit]: ", arguments);
			}

			var result = window.tracking.startTracking.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
			window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled = true;

			return result;
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackRecordViewed = function() {

			window.pageUtil.trackEvent("CoreUI_ContentRecordTextViewed");
		};
	})("false" === "true");
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal = window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal || {};

    window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.whenModuleAvailable = function(moduleName, callback) {

        var retryCount = 0;
        var intervalId = window.setInterval(function () {
            if (window[moduleName]) {
                window.clearInterval(intervalId);
                callback(window[moduleName]);
            }
            else {
                retryCount += 1;
                if (retryCount > 200) {
                    clearInterval(intervalId);
                    console.log("Cannot find " + moduleName);
                }
            }
        }, 40);
    };

    window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.whenModuleAvailable("discoveryUIImageviewerModalFactory", imageviewerModalFactory => {
        var imageviewerModalModule = imageviewerModalFactory();
        window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.launch = imageviewerModalModule.launch;
        window.discoveryUIImageviewerModal.callbacks = {
            close: imageviewerModalModule.close
        };

					linkEls.forEach(function(linkEl) {
						var imageGid = linkEl.getAttribute("data-image-gid") || "";

			window.addEventListener("load", function() {

				// set up details info callout
				createDetailsInfoCallout();

				// monitor right column visibility
				monitorRightColumnVisibility();
			});

			function monitorRightColumnVisibility() {

				const recordPage = document.querySelector('.cssGridRecordPage');
				const thumbnailContainer = document.querySelector('.thumbnailRecordPageContainer');
				const rightColumn = document.querySelector('.cssGridCol:last-child');

				if (!recordPage || !rightColumn) {
					return;
				}

				let debounceTimer;

				function checkVisibility() {

					clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
					debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
						const allItems = rightColumn.querySelectorAll('.cssGridItem');
						const shouldHide = allItems.length === 0;

						// add single-column style if there are no .cssGridItem in rightColumn
						recordPage.classList[shouldHide ? "add" : "remove"]('single-column');
						if (thumbnailContainer) {
							thumbnailContainer.classList[shouldHide ? "add" : "remove"]('single-column');
						}
					}, 100);
				}

				// initial check
				setTimeout(checkVisibility, 1000);

				// monitor for child element changes (e.g. removal)
				const observer = new MutationObserver(checkVisibility);
				observer.observe(rightColumn, {
					subtree: true,
					// note: childList:true could cause some jumpiness when page is rendering,
					// but supports dynamic deletion of elements (instead of simply adding .noDisplay)
					childList: true
				});
			}

			function createDetailsInfoCallout() {

				const detailsHelpEl = document.getElementById("detailsHelp");
				if (!detailsHelpEl) {
					return;
				}

				const helpContent = `
					<p>When you're reviewing this record, keep in mind:</p>
					<ul class="bulleted" style="margin-left: 20px">
					<li><p>Human error and damage over time can lead to incorrect or incomplete details</p></li>
					
					<li><p>When it's available, you can view the record image to find more details to help you decide</p></li>
					</ul>
					`;
				window.ui.callout(detailsHelpEl, {
					content: helpContent,
					width: "350"
				});
			}
		</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	window.addEventListener("load", function() {
		window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("utilities", function(utilities) {

			let isProgrammaticClose = false;

			window.webCrawledModal = {
				showModal: function(externalUrl, trigger) {

					const modal = window.webCrawledModal.modal = window.webCrawledModal.modal ||
						window.ui.modal("#aspenWebCrawledModal", { 
                            open: false,
                            trigger,
							onOpen: function() {
								isProgrammaticClose = false;
							},
							onClose: function() {
								if (!isProgrammaticClose && window.tracking) {
									window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "close" });
								}
							}
                        });

					const visitSiteButton = modal.element.querySelector(".visitSiteButton");
					if (visitSiteButton) {
                        
						utilities.ui.addEventListener(visitSiteButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (externalUrl) {
								window.open(externalUrl, "_blank");
							}

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "visit_site" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

                    const cancelButton = modal.element.querySelector(".cancelButton");
					if (cancelButton) {

						utilities.ui.addEventListener(cancelButton, "click", function(event) {

							if (window.tracking) {
								window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "cancel" });
							}

							isProgrammaticClose = true;
							window.ui.modal.close();
						});
					}

					modal.open();
				}
			};
		});
	});
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
	window.addEventListener("load", function () {

		const contentContainer = document.querySelector(".discoveryUIContent");
		if (!contentContainer) {
			return;
		}

		const imgExists = !!(contentContainer.querySelector(".heroImageContainer") || contentContainer.querySelector(".thumbnailContainer"));
		if (imgExists) {
			const stickyHeaderContainer = contentContainer.querySelector("#yesNoMaybe") || contentContainer.querySelector(".saveArea");
			if (stickyHeaderContainer) {
				const stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer = document.createElement("div");
				stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer.id = "stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer";
				stickyHeaderContainer.prepend(stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer);
				renderStickyHeaderThumbnail();
			}
		}

		// #region Hero Image Events

		const heroImageContainerEl = document.querySelector(".heroImageContainer");
		if (!heroImageContainerEl) {
			return;
		}

		// log royalty events for full-size hero images

		const isThumbnailImage = "true" === "true";
		if (!isThumbnailImage) {
			window.moduleUtil.whenModuleAvailable("utilities", function(utilities) {
				utilities.tracking.trackEvent("CoreUI_ContentMediaViewed");
				utilities.logging.logContentViewRecordImageBusinessEvent();
			});
		}

		// hero image click event

		const heroImageLinkEl = heroImageContainerEl.querySelector(".heroImageLink");
		heroImageLinkEl.addEventListener("click", () => {
			if (window.tracking) {
				window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_click" });
			}
		});

		// view image button click event

		const viewImageBtns = heroImageContainerEl.querySelectorAll(".ancBtn.viewRecord").forEach(btn => {
			btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
				if (window.tracking) {
					window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "hero_image", clickSubType: "hero_image_cta_click" });
				}
			});
		});

		// partner attribution click event

		const externalImageLink = heroImageContainerEl.querySelector(".externalImageLink");
		if (externalImageLink) {
			externalImageLink.addEventListener("click", () => {
				if (window.tracking) {
					window.tracking.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "source_website_link", clickSubType: "partner_attribution_hero_image" });
				}
			});
		}
		// #endregion Hero Image Events

		return;

		function renderStickyHeaderThumbnail() {

			window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return (window.recordThumbnails || {}).render; }, function(err, render) {

				try {

					if (err) { throw err; }

					const thumbnailData = {"recordGid":{"v":"5970593:8914:5970593"},"images":[{"id":"ONS_D18424AZ-0118","type":null}],"collection":{"id":8914,"title":"England & Wales, Civil Registration Death Index, 1837-1915","isMachineIndexed":false,"isWebCrawled":false,"partnerContract":{"id":null}},"hover":{"preview":true,"delay":300,"suppressOnboarding":false},"context":{"client":"discoveryui-content"}};

					thumbnailData.dom = {
						containerId: "stickyHeaderThumbnailContainer",
						fixedSize: 50,
						iconClass: "noDisplay",
						callbacks: {
							onclick() {
								window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "image_thumbnail" });
							},
							externalSiteModal: {
								onclose(e) {
									
									if (!e?.detail?.isProgrammaticClose) {
										window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "close" });
									}
								},
								onctaclick() {
									window.pageUtil.trackEvent("ContentUI_RecordDetailObjectClicked", { clickType: "going_outside_ancestry_modal", clickSubType: "visit_site" });
								}
							}
						}
					};

					thumbnailData.hover = undefined;

					render({ thumbnails: [thumbnailData] });
				}
				catch (err) {

					console.log("renderStickyHeaderThumbnail: err: ", err);
				}
			});
		}
	});

	function initializeImageHighlighting() {

		try {
			const heroImageContainer = document.querySelector(".heroImageContainer");

			if (!heroImageContainer) {
				return;
			}
			const heroImageWrapperEl = heroImageContainer.querySelector(".heroImageWrapper");
			const recordImageEl = heroImageWrapperEl.querySelector("img");
			const recordRows = {};

			if (!recordRows.primaryRecordRows || !recordRows.primaryRecordRows.length) {
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
				return;
			}

			const svgEl = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
			svgEl.classList.add("highlightSvg");
			svgEl.setAttribute("viewBox", `0 0 ${recordImageEl.naturalWidth} ${recordImageEl.naturalHeight}`);
			svgEl.setAttribute("preserveAspectRatio", "xMinYMin meet");
			
			recordRows.primaryRecordRows.forEach(row => {
				appendSvgRect(row, true);
			});

			if (recordRows.householdRecordRows) {
				recordRows.householdRecordRows.forEach(row => {
					appendSvgRect(row, false);
				});
			}
			
			heroImageWrapperEl.appendChild(svgEl);
			centerPrimaryRow();
			const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(centerPrimaryRow);
			resizeObserver.observe(recordImageEl);

			function appendSvgRect(row, isPrimaryRecord) {

				const polygon = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "polygon");
				const points = `${row.topLeft.x},${row.topLeft.y} ${row.topRight.x},${row.topRight.y} ${row.bottomRight.x},${row.bottomRight.y} ${row.bottomLeft.x},${row.bottomLeft.y}`;
				polygon.setAttribute("points", points);
				polygon.setAttribute("fill", isPrimaryRecord ? "#FFFF33" : "#72AE24");
				polygon.setAttribute("opacity", "0.25");
				svgEl.appendChild(polygon);
			}

			function centerPrimaryRow() {

				const primaryRow = recordRows.primaryRecordRows[0];
				const scale = recordImageEl.clientWidth / recordImageEl.naturalWidth;
				const rowCenterY = ((primaryRow.topLeft.y + primaryRow.bottomLeft.y) / 2) * scale;
				const heroImageContainerCenterY = heroImageContainer.clientHeight / 2;
				heroImageWrapperEl.style.transform = `translateY(${heroImageContainerCenterY - rowCenterY}px)`;
				heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
			}
		}
		catch (err) {

			heroImageWrapperEl.classList.remove("initializingHighlight");
		}
	}
</script>
<script id="pageUtilScript">

	(function(consolable) {

		window.pageUtil = window.moduleUtil = window.moduleUtil || {

			waitFor: function(resolver, callback) {
				var intervalMs = 40, retries = 200;

				function checkAvailability(tries) {
					const result = resolver();

					if (result) {
						callback(null, result);
					} else if (tries >= retries) {
						callback("Failed to resolve", result);
					} else {
						setTimeout(() => { checkAvailability(tries + 1); } , intervalMs);
					}
				};

				checkAvailability(0);
			},

			whenModuleAvailable: function(moduleName, callback) {
				window.pageUtil.waitFor(function() { return window[moduleName]; }, function(err, result) {

					if (!err) {
						callback(window[moduleName]);
					}
				});
			}
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackEvent = function() {

			if (!window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled && consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent].info: pageUtil.trackInit not successfully called.");
			}

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.trackEvent) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackEvent]: ", arguments);
			}

			return window.tracking.trackEvent.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackInit = function() {

			if (!window.tracking || "function" !== typeof window.tracking.startTracking) {
				return;
			}

			if (consolable) {
				console.log("[pageUtil.trackInit]: ", arguments);
			}

			var result = window.tracking.startTracking.apply(window.tracking, arguments);
			window.pageUtil.trackEvent.enabled = true;

			return result;
		};

		window.pageUtil.trackRecordViewed = function() {

			window.pageUtil.trackEvent("CoreUI_ContentRecordTextViewed");
		};
	})("false" === "true");
</script>
